code: import{createClient}from'@supabase/supabase-js';const supabaseUrl=process.env.REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL;const supabaseAnonKey=process.env.REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;function makeDummyClient(){const msg='Supabase is not configured. Set REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL and REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.local';const chainable=()=>{const result=Promise.resolve({data:null,error:{message:msg}});const proxy=new Proxy({},{get:()=>()=>proxy});proxy.then=result.then.bind(result);proxy.catch=result.catch.bind(result);return proxy;};return{from:()=>chainable(),storage:{from:()=>({upload:async()=>({data:null,error:{message:msg}})})},auth:{signUp:async()=>({data:null,error:{message:msg}}),signInWithPassword:async()=>({data:null,error:{message:msg}}),signOut:async()=>({error:{message:msg}})}};}let supabase;const isProd=process.env.NODE_ENV==='production';if(!supabaseUrl||!supabaseAnonKey){const msg='Supabase URL or ANON KEY is not set in environment variables.';if(isProd){throw new Error("".concat(msg," Add REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL and REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY during build for production."));}console.warn(msg+' Falling back to dummy client for development.');supabase=makeDummyClient();}else{supabase=createClient(supabaseUrl,supabaseAnonKey);}export{supabase};
